summary: Made a surgical opening adjustment to reduce repetition with chapter 1's closing beat and give chapter 2 a cleaner, distinct entry point while preserving the same scene action, tone, and information.
edits: Reframed the opening around the bathroom door click instead of replaying Sarah's breathing settling as the chapter's first move.
Folded the original careful bed-exit details into the new opening paragraph so the mirror sequence still starts from the same physical and emotional state.
Removed the now-redundant standalone bathroom-door paragraph after the date confirmation.
